title: Senior Financial Analyst - Mahindra Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Mahindra Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Mahindra Finance in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra Finance:
Mahindra Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Finance!
